text: next we are going to solve our practice question no. 4 the question is print the following on the screen using h1 heading elements means I have to print this whole line on my screen in the form of h1 heading element means the whole thing will come under h1 heading tag and will be printed in that way first of all let's talk about our first line in first line it is written Pythagoras theorem says this is proper English so I don't have to do much in this I have to copy paste it but I can see subscript is being used in this formula so I am going to use sup tag here to write this line we are going to make h1 element in our html code heading element in which I am going to write Pythagoras theorem says let's write a here now after a I want square so for superscript element I will write sup tag in which we will write 2 after that we will write a plus sign after space b and again copy sup tag and again space equal to c and again tag save and now run so in this way Pythagoras theorem says this whole line is printed now let's talk about our second line in second line this is my second line this is proper English so I don't have to change anything in this this is my chemical formula in which 6,12 and 6 I can see this is going to come under my subscript so for this I am going to use sup tag let's write this in code I will make my heading element in which I am going to write formula for glucose is c here I will write sub6h here 12,4,6 let's save and now run so this second line is also printed so now we are understanding that the formula of math or science written on websites how can we present it in html form on a webpage Thanks for watching it
